## Release state

Latest release: v1.0.1
Previous release: v1.0.0
Patch: metadata-only / navigation-only / trilogy bridge alignment
Repository: https://github.com/Kot141078/qubit-of-hope-volume-ii
Volume I: https://github.com/Kot141078/qubit-of-hope-volume-i
Volume II: https://github.com/Kot141078/qubit-of-hope-volume-ii
Volume III: https://github.com/Kot141078/qubit-of-hope-volume-iii

Repo: qubit-of-hope-volume-ii
Title: Qubit of Hope — Volume II
Status: public-release-v1.0.0

Publication state:
- publicly published on GitHub main branch
- first tagged release: v1.0.0
- rights remain all rights reserved

What this repo is:
- multilingual public reading repository for Volume II
- stable container for imported publication assets
- canonical reader and machine-readable layout over a flat source pack
- provenance and drift layer with visible integrity manifests
- reader-facing repository with restrictive rights

What this repo is not:
- drafting workspace
- translation workbench
- source-normalization sandbox
- silent rename zone

Key files:
- README.md
- DOWNLOADS.md
- RELEASE_STATUS.md
- MACHINE_ENTRY.md
- REPO_INDEX.json
- BOOK_METADATA.json
- EDITIONS_MATRIX.json
- MANIFEST.json
- RIGHTS.json
- metadata/ASSET_MAP.json
- metadata/RELEASE_STATUS.json
- metadata/SOURCE_PROVENANCE.md

Language coverage:
- ru
- fr
- es
- de
- en
- nl
- zh-CN

Format coverage:
- md
- pdf
- epub
- fb2

Integrity files:
- hashes/SHA256SUMS.metadata-only.txt
- hashes/SHA256SUMS.repo-all.txt
- hashes/SHA256SUMS.repo-layout.txt
- hashes/SHA256SUMS.source-tree.txt

Rights:
- all rights reserved
- public reading in repository: allowed
- local personal download: allowed
- redistribution / mirroring / translation / derivative reuse / audiobook production / commercial reuse without permission: not allowed
- no silent reuse assumption
- authoritative rights file: RIGHTS.json
- human notice: LICENSE.txt

Provenance rule:
- preserve source filenames literally and record exact source-to-repo mapping

Drift rule:
- document drift in metadata/
- do not silently normalize filenames

Previous volume URL:
- https://github.com/Kot141078/qubit-of-hope-volume-i
